name: Mandu (City of Joy)
description: A celebration in stone of the legendary romance between Baz Bahadur and Rani Roopmati, this hilltop fortress is home to exquisite Afghan architecture.
history: Reached its peak of glory under the Malwa Sultanate in the 15th-16th centuries. It features India's first marble tomb (Hoshang Shah's Tomb).
famousFor: Jahaz Mahal, Roopmati Pavilion, and Hoshang Shah Tomb.
